---
name: "Best Practices Proposal"
about: "Suggest improvements to code quality, architecture, or style."
title: "[STYLE] - Description of the best practice"
labels: enhancement, refactor
assignees: ""
---

## Best Practices & Code Quality

### Description
Clearly describe the best practice or coding standard you want to implement. Why is this important for the project?

### Objective
What are we trying to achieve with this change?
* [ ] Improved readability
* [ ] Better performance
* [ ] Reduced technical debt
* [ ] Easier testing (Unit Testing)

### Proposed Implementation
Provide a brief explanation of how the code should look. 
> **Note:** Remember to focus on the concept and structure rather than a full script.

### Current vs. Proposed
* **Current approach:** Briefly explain how we are doing it now.
* **Proposed approach:** Briefly explain the new standard or pattern.

### Impact
How will this change affect the rest of the team or the CI/CD pipeline?

### References
Add links to official documentation or style guides (e.g., Google Style Guide, Clean Code, etc.) if applicable.
